name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  exact Nat.even_or_odd n

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 2^n > 0 := by
  positivity

name: pow_add
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_add_two (a b : ℕ) : 2^(a + b) = 2^a * 2^b := by
  rw [Nat.pow_add]

-- The original code failed because it included a long explanation after the theorem,
-- which Lean interpreted as code, causing syntax errors.
-- Additionally, naming the theorem `pow_add` conflicts with the existing lemma `Nat.pow_add`.
-- The fix renames the theorem to `pow_add_two` and removes the non-code text.

name: de_morgan_not_and
code:
import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬P ∨ ¬Q) := by
  simp [or_iff_not_imp_left, not_and]
  <;> tauto

name: pow_add
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_add_two (a b : ℕ) : 2^(a + b) = 2^a * 2^b := by
  rw [Nat.pow_add]

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm {α : Type} [DecidableEq α] (A B : Finset α) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : ¬¬b = b := by
  cases b with
  | false => simp
  | true => simp

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset (α : Type*) (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s := by
  exact Set.empty_subset s

name: disjoint_compl
code:
import Mathlib

theorem disjoint_compl {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : Disjoint s (sᶜ) := by
  rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
  simp [Set.inter_compl_self]

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) :
    (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  exact List.length_append

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : ℕ) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right
  · norm_num
  · exact h

name: card_powerset

import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (s : Finset ℕ) :
    s.powerset.card = 2 ^ s.card := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset]

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := Nat.even_or_odd n

name: fintype_pigeonhole
code:
import Mathlib

theorem fintype_pigeonhole {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] (f : α → β)
    (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) :
    ¬Function.Injective f := by
  intro hf
  have ⟨x, y, hxy, hfxy⟩ := Fintype.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt f h
  exact hxy (hf hfxy)

import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b

name: double_complement

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: comp_injective
code:
import Mathlib

theorem comp_injective {f : α → β} {g : β → γ} (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (g ∘ f) := by
  exact Function.Injective.comp hg hf

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ] {f : β → γ} {g : α → β}
    (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) : StrictMono (f ∘ g) :=
  StrictMono.comp hf hg

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 2^n > 0 := by
  exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by norm_num)

name: fintype_pigeonhole
code:
import Mathlib

theorem fintype_pigeonhole {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] (f : α → β)
    (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) :
    ¬Function.Injective f := by
  intro hf
  have ⟨x, y, hxy, hfxy⟩ := Fintype.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt f h
  exact hxy (hf hfxy)
